business.name: Canyon Wheelworks
business.summary: A Tucson bicycle repair shop focused on commuter tune ups, flat fixes, and careful maintenance. Walk in service is welcome.

audience.primary: Tucson commuters and neighborhood riders who depend on their bicycles for everyday trips

offerings.name: Commuter Tune Ups
offerings.description: Routine service focused on keeping everyday bicycles working smoothly.

offerings.name: Flat Fixes
offerings.description: Repair service for flat bicycle tires.

offerings.name: Careful Maintenance
offerings.description: General bicycle maintenance based on the condition and needs of each bike.

brand.voice: Plainspoken, helpful, and grounded in everyday riding.
brand.aesthetic: A desert workshop look with warm sandstone tones, dark mechanical details, strong typography, and close bicycle component photography.

signatureMove.name: Service Wheel
signatureMove.description: A bicycle wheel diagram highlights each repair service as visitors move through the page. Selecting a spoke reveals the matching service details beside it.
signatureMove.touchFallback: On touch devices, every spoke is a labeled button and all service details remain available in a simple list below the wheel.
signatureMove.reducedMotion: With reduced motion enabled, the wheel remains still and every service label is visible without animation.

content.headline: Keep Your Everyday Ride Moving
content.subheadline: Commuter tune ups, flat fixes, and careful maintenance with walk in service welcome.
content.about: Canyon Wheelworks is a neighborhood bicycle repair shop in Tucson. We focus on commuter tune ups, flat fixes, and careful maintenance for everyday bicycles.
content.contactPrompt: Walk in with your bike and tell us what needs attention.

confirmed.label: Owner details

inferred.label: Positioning
inferred.value: Practical neighborhood care for bicycles used in everyday travel
